commander.name: Sir Alaric
commander.title: Army Commander
commander.warning: If his trust in you breaks, he will march straight to the Bishop.

citizen.name: Mira
citizen.title: Citizen Representative
citizen.warning: Lose her faith and she will whisper to the Bishop before nightfall.

priest.name: Father Edran
priest.title: Palace Priest
priest.warning: A nervous man with a loose tongue. Push too hard without leverage and he runs to the Bishop.

bishop.name: Bishop Cyril
bishop.title: The King's Bishop
bishop.warning: He is the hunter. Every careless word becomes evidence. Speak only if you must.
